CLF-C02 · 97 services · 14 concepts · 30 practice questions

Master AWS Cloud Practitioner — one service at a time.

Search any AWS topic — a service like EC2, or a concept like availability zones. Each entry includes a plain-English explanation, a memorable analogy, the exam tips that actually matter, and links to related topics.

Browse concepts

Core Concepts

14 topics
AWS infrastructure, frameworks, pricing, security

Knowledge that isn't about a single service — Regions, AZs, Shared Responsibility, Well-Architected, pricing models, support plans. Heavy on the CLF-C02 exam.
